settings.title: ⚙️ Purgito Settings
settings.intro: Server settings panel. Pick a category from the menu below to view and change its settings.
settings.no_permission: ❌ You need the `Manage Server` permission to use this panel.
settings.not_your_panel: Someone else opened this panel — use `/settings` to open your own.
settings.premium_only: ⭐ This category is only available on premium servers.
settings.guild_only: This command only works in servers.
settings.cat.idioma.label: Language
settings.cat.idioma.title: 🌐 Language
settings.idioma.body:
Current server language: **{language}**.
This language is used in settings panels and new bot messages.
settings.cat.chat.label: Chat
settings.cat.chat.desc: Automatic replies when the bot is mentioned
settings.cat.chat.title: 💬 Chat
settings.chat.status_on: Replies when mentioning the bot are **enabled**.
settings.chat.status_off: Replies when mentioning the bot are **disabled**.
settings.cat.corpus.label: Ignored channels
settings.cat.corpus.title: 🚫 Ignored channels
settings.corpus.body: The bot doesn't read or learn from these channels. Use the selector to add or remove channels (picking a channel already on the list removes it).
settings.cat.reacciones.label: Reactions
settings.cat.reacciones.title: 😀 Automatic reactions
settings.reacciones.body: The bot occasionally reacts to messages with a random emoji from this pool.
settings.reacciones.remove_placeholder: Remove an emoji from the pool…
settings.reacciones.exists: ℹ️ That emoji was already in the pool.
settings.corpus.wipe_modal_field: Type the server name to confirm
settings.corpus.wipe_mismatch: ❌ The name doesn't match the server's. Nothing was deleted.
settings.corpus.noisy_suggestion: 👀 I noticed you have a channel called {channel} — you probably don't want me learning from there. Should I exclude it?
settings.corpus.noisy_excluded: ✅ Done, I won't read or learn from {channel}. You can change this anytime in `/settings`.
settings.corpus.noisy_kept: 👍 Got it, I'll keep learning from {channel}.
settings.cat.frases.label: Phrases
settings.cat.frases.title: 🗨️ Special phrases
settings.frases.body: Phrases the bot can drop at any time.
settings.cat.youtube.label: YouTube
settings.cat.youtube.title: 📺 YouTube notifications
settings.youtube.add_pending_hint: Pick below the Discord channel where new videos will be announced.
settings.youtube.add_invalid: ❌ Couldn't fetch channel info. Check the ID.
settings.youtube.mention_placeholder: Pick a subscription to configure its mention…
settings.youtube.mention_role_placeholde: Pick a mention role (empty = remove mention)…
settings.youtube.mention_pending_hint: Pick below the role to mention (leave empty to remove the mention).
settings.cat.memes.label: Auto memes
settings.cat.memes.title: 😏 Auto memes ⭐
settings.memes.activate_pending_hint: Pick below the channel where memes will be posted.
settings.memes.activate_invalid: ❌ The interval must be a number between 2 and 24.
settings.cat.anuncios.label: Announcements
settings.cat.anuncios.desc: Automated messages scheduled to a channel
settings.cat.anuncios.title: 📢 Scheduled announcements
settings.anuncios.body: Messages the bot sends automatically to a channel, either on an interval or at a fixed time.
settings.anuncios.invalid_interval: ❌ The interval must be a number between 5 and 1440 minutes.
settings.anuncios.invalid_hour: ❌ Time must be in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. 09:00.
settings.anuncios.activate_pending_hint: Pick the channel below where the announcement will be sent.
settings.anuncios.limit_reached: ❌ This server already reached the max number of scheduled announcements. Remove one before adding another.
settings.anuncios.invalid_delete_after: ❌ Must be a number between 1 and 86400 seconds.
chat.empty_reply.full: I don't know how to talk like this server yet 😅 I need to read more of your messages first. An admin can run `/refeed_all` so I learn from the whole server history, or `/setup` to finish setting me up.
chat.empty_reply.short: still drawing a blank over here 👀
chat.muted.ignored_channel: 🤐 I don't read or reply in this channel: it's on the ignored channels list. You can change that in `/settings` → Ignored channels.
chat.muted.disabled: 🤐 Conversational chat is disabled on this server. An admin can enable it in `/settings` → Chat.
chat.muted.wrong_channel: 🤐 I only reply in {channel}. You can change that in `/settings` → Chat.
welcome.title: Hi! I'm Purgito 👋
welcome.intro: I'm a Markov bot that learns to talk like your server.
welcome.getting_started:
**To get started:**
• I already started reading this server's history — I'll let you know here when I'm done. Run `/refeed_all` anytime if you add new channels or want me to catch up
• Run `/setup` or press the button below for the initial setup
welcome.auto_refeed_done: 🎉 Done! I've learned how this server talks — mention me to try it out.
welcome.limited_visibility: 🔍 Right now I can only read {seen} of {total} channels: {names}. If you want me to learn how people actually talk here, give Purgito access to the other channels too — channel permissions, or its role in Server Settings.
welcome.thin_corpus_hidden: I finished reading, but I found very few messages ({total}). It's probably because I still can't see all your channels — give me access to more and run `/refeed_all` again.
welcome.thin_corpus_generic: I finished reading, but I found very few messages ({total}). I'll sound a bit bland for now — it'll get better as people write more.
welcome.premium_target: • React to images with 🎯 to add them to the `/momo` pool
welcome.commands:
🤖 `/generar` — generates a Markov message
🎭 `/imitar @user` — imitates a member's style
welcome.commands_tail:
🎵 `/play <song>` — plays music
⚙️ `/settings` — settings panel
📖 `/help` — full command list
welcome.trigger_hint: I also respond to `{trigger} generar` (reply to an image) to generate a quick meme.
welcome.free_note: ⭐ *Some features (memes and image pool) are premium-only.*
dm.title: 👋 Thanks for adding me to {guild}!
dm.body:
I already started reading the server's history on my own — you don't need to do anything for that.

**Whenever you want:**
• `/help` — full command list
• `/setup` — initial setup (language, chat, ignored channels)
• Web panel: {url}
dm.limited_visibility_extra: Right now I can only read {seen} of {total} channels in this server. If you want me to learn better, give Purgito access to the rest — channel permissions, or its role in Server Settings.
setup.title: 🚀 Purgito initial setup
setup.body:
I'll walk you through the essential settings. Use the menu below to go through each category:

**1. Language** — pick the bot's language 🌐
**2. Chat** — decide whether the bot replies when mentioned and in which channel 💬
**3. Ignored channels** — exclude sensitive channels (logs, announcements) 🚫

When you're done, run `/refeed_all` so the bot learns from the server history. You can come back to this panel anytime with `/settings`.
setup.panel_cta: 💻 **Web panel:** configure everything from the browser — includes a visual embed editor and interactive buttons: {url}
setup.status_header:
**Right now:**
👁️ I can see {seen} of {total} channels
💬 I have {corpus} messages saved
🚫 {ignored} channel(s) excluded
